description_long: This jewelry object features a central, rounded, dark metallic or stone-like bead, from which several elongated, flexible, reddish-brown tendrils extend outward in a radiating pattern. The tendrils appear to be made of a cord or leather-like material, giving the piece a dynamic, flowing appearance. The central bead is textured and slightly irregular, suggesting a handcrafted or artisanal quality. Two thin, black wire-like elements protrude from the bead, adding a contrasting linear accent to the organic curves of the tendrils. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, with a mix of natural and industrial aesthetics. The piece is likely intended to be worn as a statement necklace, draping around the neck with the tendrils fanning out across the chest.
description: A statement necklace with a dark, textured central bead and multiple reddish-brown cord-like tendrils radiating outward, accented by thin black wires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central bead with tendrils symmetrically fanning out to both sides and two black wires extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length and curvature of the reddish-brown tendrils extending far behind the central bead.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tendrils arching outward from the bead, with the black wires visible beneath the bead.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the elongated tendrils and the rounded form of the central bead.
